feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: The Untold Dance Between Saroj Khan, Subhash Ghai & Aroona Irani Revealed

link.title: The Untold Dance Between Saroj Khan, Subhash Ghai & Aroona Irani Revealed

entry.content: When Saroj Khan, the ace choreographer of Hindi cinema, passed away recently, most people knew that one of the filmmakers who felt the loss personally and immensely was Subhash Ghai. They had worked together right from Vidhaata in 1982 and Hero in 1983 till Kisna in 2005. Some people also know that it was actress and dancer Aroona Irani who had introduced Saroj Khan to Subhash Ghai. When he was looking for a choreographer for his film, Aroona had highly recommended Saroj Khan who was unknown and looking for work. Subhash Ghai tried out Saroj for one number in Vidhaata and they clicked so well that they made cinematic history thereafter with their scintillating song and dance numbers. However, what nobody knows is that Saroj Khan and Aroona Irani knew each other since they were 10 years old and worked in films. The production car would start at Churchgate, fetch Aroona from Grant Road and then Saroj Khan from Worli before proceeding to Mohan Studios in Andheri for the day’s shoot. Aroona became famous as a dancer after numbers like Dilbar dil se pyaare in films like Caravan. But actually she was no dancer. Aroona always acknowledged that the real dancer amongst them was Saroj Khan even as a child. Remember the song Ae phasa in Bobby? During the shooting of that song, Saroj Khan who was choreographer Sohanlal’s assistant, used to dance and show Aroona her movements and facial expressions. Saroj was so superb at both dancing and at facial expressions that people on the sets would break into applause watching her. When distributors visited the sets, Raj Kapoor would ask Saroj Khan to show her exquisite dance movements and her wide range of expressions and everybody would go away impressed. Aroona was so conscious that she was not a patch on Saroj Khan that she would cringe when she had to get up from her chair to try and replicate what Saroj had just shown her. That was Saroj’s biggest strength later on too. She not only excelled in dance movements but also in facial expressions. Later, when Saroj was looking to work as an independent choreographer, Aroona recommended her for a Rajnikant film. But the director KC Bokadia told Aroona that Saroj was not equipped to be a good choreographer because she didn’t have technical knowledge like camera placing. Therefore, when Subhash Ghai told Aroona that he was looking for a choreographer, she once again recommended her old friend Saroj Khan but she also told Subhash Ghai, she’s an excellent dancer and choreographer but you’re so good at it, you’ll have to teach her camera placing and other technical aspects. That’s how the great partnership began between Subhash Ghai and Saroj Khan and he helped to add technical knowledge to her natural skills. When Madhuri and Sridevi insisted on having Saroj Khan to compose all their song and dance sequences, it was because she had become a complete choreographer who also enacted and gave them fabulous facial expressions to go with their sensual dance movements. Madhuri D
entry.summary: When Saroj Khan, the ace choreographer of Hindi cinema, passed away recently, most people knew that one of the filmmakers who felt the loss personally and immensely was Subhash Ghai. They had worked together right from Vidhaata in 1982 and Hero in 1983 till Kisna in 2005. Some people also know that it was actress and dancer Aroona Irani who had introduced Saroj Khan to Subhash Ghai. When he was looking for a choreographer for his film, Aroona had highly recommended Saroj Khan who was unknown and looking for work. Subhash Ghai tried out Saroj for one number in Vidhaata and they clicked so well that they made cinematic history thereafter with their scintillating song and dance numbers. However, what nobody knows is that Saroj Khan and Aroona Irani knew each other since they were 10 years old and worked in films. The production car would start at Churchgate, fetch Aroona from Grant Road and then Saroj Khan from Worli before proceeding to Mohan Studios in Andheri for the day’s shoot. Aroona became famous as a dancer after numbers like Dilbar dil se pyaare in films like Caravan. But actually she was no dancer. Aroona always acknowledged that the real dancer amongst them was Saroj Khan even as a child. Remember the song Ae phasa in Bobby? During the shooting of that song, Saroj Khan who was choreographer Sohanlal’s assistant, used to dance and show Aroona her movements and facial expressions. Saroj was so superb at both dancing and at facial expressions that people on the sets would break into applause watching her. When distributors visited the sets, Raj Kapoor would ask Saroj Khan to show her exquisite dance movements and her wide range of expressions and everybody would go away impressed. Aroona was so conscious that she was not a patch on Saroj Khan that she would cringe when she had to get up from her chair to try and replicate what Saroj had just shown her. That was Saroj’s biggest strength later on too. She not only excelled in dance movements but also in facial expressions. Later, when Saroj was looking to work as an independent choreographer, Aroona recommended her for a Rajnikant film. But the director KC Bokadia told Aroona that Saroj was not equipped to be a good choreographer because she didn’t have technical knowledge like camera placing. Therefore, when Subhash Ghai told Aroona that he was looking for a choreographer, she once again recommended her old friend Saroj Khan but she also told Subhash Ghai, she’s an excellent dancer and choreographer but you’re so good at it, you’ll have to teach her camera placing and other technical aspects. That’s how the great partnership began between Subhash Ghai and Saroj Khan and he helped to add technical knowledge to her natural skills. When Madhuri and Sridevi insisted on having Saroj Khan to compose all their song and dance sequences, it was because she had become a complete choreographer who also enacted and gave them fabulous facial expressions to go with their sensual dance movements. Madhuri D

entry.title: Donald Trump recommande désormais le port du masque

link.title: Donald Trump recommande désormais le port du masque

entry.content: Le président américain change de ton : il admet désormais que la pandémie de coronavirus prend des proportions inquiétantes aux Etats-Unis et recommande le port du masque, exemple à l’appui.
entry.summary: Le président américain change de ton : il admet désormais que la pandémie de coronavirus prend des proportions inquiétantes aux Etats-Unis et recommande le port du masque, exemple à l’appui.

entry.title: India warns China and Pakistan on Kargil Vijay Diwas

link.title: India warns China and Pakistan on Kargil Vijay Diwas

entry.content: PM Narendra Modi warned China and Pakistan to be careful in ‘Mann ki Baat on Kargil Vijay Diwas. Defense Minister Rajnath Singh also gave advice to both countries. PM Narendra Modi said, Pakistan had stabbed him in the back at that time, but our brave soldiers thwarted his plot. #KargilVijayDiwas #PMNarendraModi #RajnathSingh #China #Pakistan
entry.summary: PM Narendra Modi warned China and Pakistan to be careful in ‘Mann ki Baat on Kargil Vijay Diwas. Defense Minister Rajnath Singh also gave advice to both countries. PM Narendra Modi said, Pakistan had stabbed him in the back at that time, but our brave soldiers thwarted his plot. #KargilVijayDiwas #PMNarendraModi #RajnathSingh #China #Pakistan

entry.title: Corona ने Jharkhand में अपने को बनाया बेगाना, परिजन शव लेने से कर रहे इनकार वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Corona ने Jharkhand में अपने को बनाया बेगाना, परिजन शव लेने से कर रहे इनकार वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Corona has also made her people unfit.In this crisis, family members have turned away from the patient. But those who swear to live together are not even performing the last rites after death.There are many corpses lying in the rims.but the relatives do not carry the corpse.Meanwhile some social people are working to fulfill this obligation.
कोरोना ने अपने लोगों को भी बेगाना बना दिया है…..इस संकट काल में मरीज से परिजनों ने मुंह मोड़ लिया है…..लेकिन साथ मरने जीने की कसम खाने वाले लोग मरने के बाद अंतिम संस्कार भी नहीं कर रहे हैं……रिम्स में कई लाश पड़े रहते हैं लेकिन परिजन लाश को नहीं ले जाते हैं…..इस बीच कुछ सामाजिक लोगों ने इस दायित्व को निभाने का काम कर रहे हैं…….
#Coronavirus #Jharkhand #Covid-19
entry.summary: Corona has also made her people unfit.In this crisis, family members have turned away from the patient. But those who swear to live together are not even performing the last rites after death.There are many corpses lying in the rims.but the relatives do not carry the corpse.Meanwhile some social people are working to fulfill this obligation. कोरोना ने अपने लोगों को भी बेगाना बना दिया है…..इस संकट काल में मरीज से परिजनों ने मुंह मोड़ लिया है…..लेकिन साथ मरने जीने की कसम खाने वाले लोग मरने के बाद अंतिम संस्कार भी नहीं कर रहे हैं……रिम्स में कई लाश पड़े रहते हैं लेकिन परिजन लाश को नहीं ले जाते हैं…..इस बीच कुछ सामाजिक लोगों ने इस दायित्व को निभाने का काम कर रहे हैं……. #Coronavirus #Jharkhand #Covid-19

entry.title: Love, Victor’s RACHEL HILSON Has A Message Of Love For Fellow BLM Protesters Bustle

link.title: Love, Victor’s RACHEL HILSON Has A Message Of Love For Fellow BLM Protesters Bustle

entry.content:
Rachel Hilson isn’t wasting any time these days. Whether she’s encouraging health safety and grabbing a good bite to eat at the local farmer’s market or making history with the Black Lives Matter movement, Hulu’s ‘Love, Victor’ star is keeping busy and enjoying a burrito through it all.
Bustle Booth: At Home checks in on our favorite celebs to see how they’re spending their newfound free time. Join us as we sneak a peek into the lives of celebrities in all of our natural habitats right now — home! Are they baking the same bread as you? Have they zoomed through your favorite series yet? Find out on Bustle Booth: At Home!
entry.summary: Rachel Hilson isn’t wasting any time these days. Whether she’s encouraging health safety and grabbing a good bite to eat at the local farmer’s market or making history with the Black Lives Matter movement, Hulu’s ‘Love, Victor’ star is keeping busy and enjoying a burrito through it all. Bustle Booth: At Home checks in on our favorite celebs to see how they’re spending their newfound free time. Join us as we sneak a peek into the lives of celebrities in all of our natural habitats right now — home! Are they baking the same bread as you? Have they zoomed through your favorite series yet? Find out on Bustle Booth: At Home!

entry.title: Millie Bobby Brown wants to learn how to surf

link.title: Millie Bobby Brown wants to learn how to surf

entry.content: Millie Bobby Brown wants to learn to surf, because she thinks it would be something she’d really enjoy when she’s visiting her favourite beaches.
entry.summary: Millie Bobby Brown wants to learn to surf, because she thinks it would be something she’d really enjoy when she’s visiting her favourite beaches.

entry.title: ✅ Gérald Darmanin accusé : “C’est vrai, j’ai eu une vie de jeune homme »

link.title: ✅ Gérald Darmanin accusé : “C’est vrai, j’ai eu une vie de jeune homme »

entry.content:
Please Subscribe:
✍ La situation est plus que délicate pour Gérald Darmanin. Accusé de viol en 2017 par Sophie Patterson-Spatz, le ministre de l’Intérieur est fustigé par l’opposition et les défenseurs des droits des femmes. Dans un entretien accordé à la Voix du Nord ce samedi 18 juillet, Gérald Darmanin, dont les blagues sexistes resurgissent, a tenu à mettre les choses au clair, mais surtout à se défendre. .Un honneur bafoué ? .Gérald Darmanin, qui aurait usé de sa fonction pour obtenir des faveurs sexuelles, a reconnu avoir eu une relation sexuelle avec Sophie Patterson-Spatz. Une relation selon lui librement consentie, qui contredirait donc les accusations de viol. "Mettez-vous à la place de quelqu’un qui est accusé à tort, donc l’honneur est bafoué, dont la famille est insultée. Trois décisions de justice m’ont été favorables. (…) On peut quand même demander une modération dans les propos, surtout quand il s’agit de l’honneur de quelqu’un. " .Si Gérald Darmanin reconnaît avoir eu des relations …
#Galapolitique, #gouvernement, #Justice, #accusations, #viol
entry.summary: Please Subscribe: ✍ La situation est plus que délicate pour Gérald Darmanin. Accusé de viol en 2017 par Sophie Patterson-Spatz, le ministre de l’Intérieur est fustigé par l’opposition et les défenseurs des droits des femmes. Dans un entretien accordé à la Voix du Nord ce samedi 18 juillet, Gérald Darmanin, dont les blagues sexistes resurgissent, a tenu à mettre les choses au clair, mais surtout à se défendre. .Un honneur bafoué ? .Gérald Darmanin, qui aurait usé de sa fonction pour obtenir des faveurs sexuelles, a reconnu avoir eu une relation sexuelle avec Sophie Patterson-Spatz. Une relation selon lui librement consentie, qui contredirait donc les accusations de viol. "Mettez-vous à la place de quelqu’un qui est accusé à tort, donc l’honneur est bafoué, dont la famille est insultée. Trois décisions de justice m’ont été favorables. (…) On peut quand même demander une modération dans les propos, surtout quand il s’agit de l’honneur de quelqu’un. " .Si Gérald Darmanin reconnaît avoir eu des relations … #Galapolitique, #gouvernement, #Justice, #accusations, #viol

entry.title: KenFM im Gespräch mit: Rüdiger Lenz („Die Fratze der Gewalt“)

link.title: KenFM im Gespräch mit: Rüdiger Lenz („Die Fratze der Gewalt“)

entry.content:
Rüdiger Lenz ist hochgraduierter Kampfkünstler und entwickelte das Nichtkampf-Prinzip. Zudem ist er Tätertherapeut und bezeichnet sich als Freidenker und Friedensaktivist.
Sein Buch "Die Fratze der Gewalt" beschäftigt sich mit den unfassbarsten Gewalttaten in unserer Gesellschaft und wird von dem Filmemacher und Journalisten Frieder Wagner (u.a. über Uranmunition "Deadly Dust" / "Todesstaub") als Anstoß zum "dringend notwendig gewordenen kritischen Denken" und als Anlass, wieder den eigenen Kopf zu benutzen, bezeichnet.
Ken Jebsen im Gespräch mit Rüdiger Lenz über die Fratze der Gewalt, positive und negative Aggressivität, Mind-Doping, "Killerspiele" und vieles mehr!
Rüdiger Lenz ist online über seine Homepage zu erreichen:
+++
KenFM jetzt auch als kostenlose App für Android- und iOS-Geräte verfügbar! Über unsere Homepage kommt Ihr zu den Stores von Apple und Google. Hier der Link:
+++
Abonniere jetzt den KenFM-Newsletter:
+++
Unterstütze uns mit einem Abo:
+++
Dir gefällt unser Programm? Informationen zu weiteren Unterstützungsmöglichkeiten hier:
+++
Jetzt kannst Du uns auch mit Bitcoins unterstützen.
BitCoin Adresse: 18FpEnH1Dh83GXXGpRNqSoW5TL1z1PZgZK
entry.summary: Rüdiger Lenz ist hochgraduierter Kampfkünstler und entwickelte das Nichtkampf-Prinzip. Zudem ist er Tätertherapeut und bezeichnet sich als Freidenker und Friedensaktivist. Sein Buch "Die Fratze der Gewalt" beschäftigt sich mit den unfassbarsten Gewalttaten in unserer Gesellschaft und wird von dem Filmemacher und Journalisten Frieder Wagner (u.a. über Uranmunition "Deadly Dust" / "Todesstaub") als Anstoß zum "dringend notwendig gewordenen kritischen Denken" und als Anlass, wieder den eigenen Kopf zu benutzen, bezeichnet. Ken Jebsen im Gespräch mit Rüdiger Lenz über die Fratze der Gewalt, positive und negative Aggressivität, Mind-Doping, "Killerspiele" und vieles mehr! Rüdiger Lenz ist online über seine Homepage zu erreichen: +++ KenFM jetzt auch als kostenlose App für Android- und iOS-Geräte verfügbar! Über unsere Homepage kommt Ihr zu den Stores von Apple und Google. Hier der Link: +++ Abonniere jetzt den KenFM-Newsletter: +++ Unterstütze uns mit einem Abo: +++ Dir gefällt unser Programm? Informationen zu weiteren Unterstützungsmöglichkeiten hier: +++ Jetzt kannst Du uns auch mit Bitcoins unterstützen. BitCoin Adresse: 18FpEnH1Dh83GXXGpRNqSoW5TL1z1PZgZK

entry.title: Les bébés du confinement, épisode 2 : Rym

link.title: Les bébés du confinement, épisode 2 : Rym

entry.content: Etre confiné, c’est compliqué. L’être près de 3 mois avant tout le monde parce que sa grossesse présente des risques, c’est insupportable. C’est ce qu’a dû affronter Rym, qui nous raconte une période interminable faite d’angoisse et d’impatience, qui heureusement se termine bien.
entry.summary: Etre confiné, c’est compliqué. L’être près de 3 mois avant tout le monde parce que sa grossesse présente des risques, c’est insupportable. C’est ce qu’a dû affronter Rym, qui nous raconte une période interminable faite d’angoisse et d’impatience, qui heureusement se termine bien.

entry.title: England vs West Indies 2nd Test, Day 5: Ben Stokes fireworks set WI 312 to win वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: England vs West Indies 2nd Test, Day 5: Ben Stokes fireworks set WI 312 to win वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Day 5 of the second Test in Manchester, Ben Stokes creamed yet another half-century as England declared their second innings on 129/3, setting West Indies a target of 312 to win. Stokes remained unbeaten on 78 off 57 with four fours and three sixes. West Indies need to survive 85 overs to retain the Wisden Trophy.
इंग्लैंड और वेस्टइंडीज के बीच तीन मैचों की टेस्ट सीरीज का दूसरा मुकाबला मैनचेस्टर में खेला जा रहा है। मैच के चौथे दिन दूसरी पारी में इंग्लैंड ने 2 विकेट के नुकसान पर 37 रन बनाए थे और उसके पास कुल 219 रन की बढ़त हासिल थी। 5वें दिन इंग्लैंड ने बेन स्टोक्स के तूफानी अर्धशतक के दम पर वेस्टइंडीज को 312 रन का लक्ष्य दिया है, बेन स्टोक्स ने 57 गेंदों पर 78 रन की शानदार पारी खेली, कप्तान जो रुट के साथ उन्होने शानदार पार्टनरशीप बनाई ।
#EnglandvsWestIndies #2ndTest #Day5 #BenStokes
entry.summary: Day 5 of the second Test in Manchester, Ben Stokes creamed yet another half-century as England declared their second innings on 129/3, setting West Indies a target of 312 to win. Stokes remained unbeaten on 78 off 57 with four fours and three sixes. West Indies need to survive 85 overs to retain the Wisden Trophy. इंग्लैंड और वेस्टइंडीज के बीच तीन मैचों की टेस्ट सीरीज का दूसरा मुकाबला मैनचेस्टर में खेला जा रहा है। मैच के चौथे दिन दूसरी पारी में इंग्लैंड ने 2 विकेट के नुकसान पर 37 रन बनाए थे और उसके पास कुल 219 रन की बढ़त हासिल थी। 5वें दिन इंग्लैंड ने बेन स्टोक्स के तूफानी अर्धशतक के दम पर वेस्टइंडीज को 312 रन का लक्ष्य दिया है, बेन स्टोक्स ने 57 गेंदों पर 78 रन की शानदार पारी खेली, कप्तान जो रुट के साथ उन्होने शानदार पार्टनरशीप बनाई । #EnglandvsWestIndies #2ndTest #Day5 #BenStokes

entry.title: La Chine lance sa première sonde vers Mars

link.title: La Chine lance sa première sonde vers Mars

entry.content: La Chine à l’assaut de Mars ! Trois jours après les Émirats arabes unis, le géant asiatique a lancé jeudi avec succès une sonde qui va parcourir un long voyage jusqu’à la planète rouge, en pleine rivalité diplomatique et technologique avec les Etats-Unis. L’engin a été propulsé par une fusée Longue-Marche 5, la plus puissante de la panoplie chinoise, qui a décollé dans un nuage de fumée du centre de Wenchang, sur l’île tropicale de Hainan. La sonde n’arrivera pas avant 2021. Elle devra d’abord effectuer en quelque 7 mois le long trajet Terre-Mars. La distance varie mais est au minimum de 55 millions de kilomètres – soit 1.400 fois le tour du monde. Ambitieuse, la Chine espère faire lors de cette première tentative indépendante presque tout ce que les Etats-Unis ont réalisé en plusieurs missions martiennes depuis les années 1960.
entry.summary: La Chine à l’assaut de Mars ! Trois jours après les Émirats arabes unis, le géant asiatique a lancé jeudi avec succès une sonde qui va parcourir un long voyage jusqu’à la planète rouge, en pleine rivalité diplomatique et technologique avec les Etats-Unis. L’engin a été propulsé par une fusée Longue-Marche 5, la plus puissante de la panoplie chinoise, qui a décollé dans un nuage de fumée du centre de Wenchang, sur l’île tropicale de Hainan. La sonde n’arrivera pas avant 2021. Elle devra d’abord effectuer en quelque 7 mois le long trajet Terre-Mars. La distance varie mais est au minimum de 55 millions de kilomètres – soit 1.400 fois le tour du monde. Ambitieuse, la Chine espère faire lors de cette première tentative indépendante presque tout ce que les Etats-Unis ont réalisé en plusieurs missions martiennes depuis les années 1960.

entry.title: GMA workers demand testing after employee gets COVID-19

link.title: GMA workers demand testing after employee gets COVID-19

entry.content:
Workers of media giant GMA Network demand the company test newsroom employees for the coronavirus, after a staff member tested positive for COVID-19.
Read:
entry.summary: Workers of media giant GMA Network demand the company test newsroom employees for the coronavirus, after a staff member tested positive for COVID-19. Read:

entry.title: 1971 Indo-Pak War: Remembering Jharkhand’s son Lance Naik Albert Ekka Oneindia News

link.title: 1971 Indo-Pak War: Remembering Jharkhand’s son Lance Naik Albert Ekka Oneindia News

entry.content:
It was on the intervening night of December 3 and 4, 1971, when Lance Naik Albert Ekka and his men of the 14 Guards Regiment of the Indian Army made the supreme sacrifice while defending the nation against the forces of Pakistan, in the process saving Agartala from a foreign invasion. The battle which safeguarded Agartala, took place near Gangasagar railway station, 7 Km from the state capital in 1971. LN Ekka was posthumously awarded India’s highest gallantry award the Param Vir Chakra (PVC).
#1971IndoPakWar #AlbertEkka #Jharkhand
entry.summary: It was on the intervening night of December 3 and 4, 1971, when Lance Naik Albert Ekka and his men of the 14 Guards Regiment of the Indian Army made the supreme sacrifice while defending the nation against the forces of Pakistan, in the process saving Agartala from a foreign invasion. The battle which safeguarded Agartala, took place near Gangasagar railway station, 7 Km from the state capital in 1971. LN Ekka was posthumously awarded India’s highest gallantry award the Param Vir Chakra (PVC). #1971IndoPakWar #AlbertEkka #Jharkhand

entry.title: Mengintip Dokter Gigi Viral Pakai APD Stylish di Malang

link.title: Mengintip Dokter Gigi Viral Pakai APD Stylish di Malang

entry.content:
Nama drg. Nina Agustin mendadak ramai diperbincangkan di jagat maya. Sebab, dokter yang praktek di Kota Malang ini tampak stylish mengenakan baju hazmat lengkap besrta APD (alat pelindung diri) saat melayani pasien.
Link terkait:
Reporter suarajatim.id berkesempatan ‘mengintip’ langsung aktivitas drg. Nina di klinik Nina Esthetic Dental Clinic (NDC) Perum Araya, Sabtu (24/7/2002). Dibantu seorang asisten dokter gigi yang juga berpakaian APD lengkap, Ia dengan cekatan memeriksa pasien perempuan.
Dari total 25 koleksi baju hazmat stylish, perempuan berkulit kuning langsat itu memilih setelan berwarna merah muda seperti tokoh superhero Power Rangers.
Selengkapnya dalam video ini.
#DokterViral #Stylish
Video Editor: Sulistyo Jati K
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Nama drg. Nina Agustin mendadak ramai diperbincangkan di jagat maya. Sebab, dokter yang praktek di Kota Malang ini tampak stylish mengenakan baju hazmat lengkap besrta APD (alat pelindung diri) saat melayani pasien. Link terkait: Reporter suarajatim.id berkesempatan ‘mengintip’ langsung aktivitas drg. Nina di klinik Nina Esthetic Dental Clinic (NDC) Perum Araya, Sabtu (24/7/2002). Dibantu seorang asisten dokter gigi yang juga berpakaian APD lengkap, Ia dengan cekatan memeriksa pasien perempuan. Dari total 25 koleksi baju hazmat stylish, perempuan berkulit kuning langsat itu memilih setelan berwarna merah muda seperti tokoh superhero Power Rangers. Selengkapnya dalam video ini. #DokterViral #Stylish Video Editor: Sulistyo Jati K ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: Anna Stezi et Puma s’associent pour la création de masques redistribués à OM Fondation

link.title: Anna Stezi et Puma s’associent pour la création de masques redistribués à OM Fondation

entry.content: Le fruit d’une collaboration entre la styliste Anna Stezi, Puma et OM Fondation, a permis la création de masques OM distribués à différentes associations.
entry.summary: Le fruit d’une collaboration entre la styliste Anna Stezi, Puma et OM Fondation, a permis la création de masques OM distribués à différentes associations.

entry.title: Bulldog Plays With Herd of Cows in Field

link.title: Bulldog Plays With Herd of Cows in Field

entry.content:
Gus, the bulldog, decided to have fun in the field with a herd of cows. They got up close and personal with them and ran around the place as they chased them. The cows seemed quite intrigued by the little animal’s presence, and curiously followed them.
*The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).
entry.summary: Gus, the bulldog, decided to have fun in the field with a herd of cows. They got up close and personal with them and ran around the place as they chased them. The cows seemed quite intrigued by the little animal’s presence, and curiously followed them. *The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).

entry.title: Boy drives tractor to help family collect ocean trash in Cambodia

link.title: Boy drives tractor to help family collect ocean trash in Cambodia

entry.content:
A young lad was seen skillfully driving a field tractor to help his family collect trash on the beach near a small village in Preah Sihanouk, southern Cambodia.
The youngster was with his mother, Neak, and his father and other relatives when they went to collect the rubbish.
Neak said that they collect ocean pollution to help keep the area clean and then they recycle it for money.
Cambodia’s poverty rate in the past six years has been rising, which has affected more than five million native people who live in the countryside remain near-poor.
The clip was filmed on July 20.
entry.summary: A young lad was seen skillfully driving a field tractor to help his family collect trash on the beach near a small village in Preah Sihanouk, southern Cambodia. The youngster was with his mother, Neak, and his father and other relatives when they went to collect the rubbish. Neak said that they collect ocean pollution to help keep the area clean and then they recycle it for money. Cambodia’s poverty rate in the past six years has been rising, which has affected more than five million native people who live in the countryside remain near-poor. The clip was filmed on July 20.

entry.title: Drone Prathap Yeah Fake Prathap Know About Prathap NM The MCGUDDU Show वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Drone Prathap Yeah Fake Prathap Know About Prathap NM The MCGUDDU Show वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Today’s show we will be discussing about the trending Drone Boy Prathap NM. Will be disclosing all facts behind his story.
आज के शो में हम बात करेंगे सोशल मीडिया पर छाए कर्नाटक के एक छोटे से गांव के रहने वाले प्रताप के बारे में. कहा जा रहा है कि उसके पास फ्रांस से मोटी पगार वाली नौकरी का प्रस्ताव आया था, पर उसने मना कर दिया. दावा किया जा रहा है कि प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी ने इस 21 साल के काबिल लड़के को डीआरडीओ में वैज्ञानिक नियुक्त किया है. इसी पर है हमारा The MCGUDDU Show. कि क्या है असलियत ड्रोन बनाने वाले प्रताप की
#mcguddu #droneprathap #prathapnm #fakenews
entry.summary: Today’s show we will be discussing about the trending Drone Boy Prathap NM. Will be disclosing all facts behind his story. आज के शो में हम बात करेंगे सोशल मीडिया पर छाए कर्नाटक के एक छोटे से गांव के रहने वाले प्रताप के बारे में. कहा जा रहा है कि उसके पास फ्रांस से मोटी पगार वाली नौकरी का प्रस्ताव आया था, पर उसने मना कर दिया. दावा किया जा रहा है कि प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी ने इस 21 साल के काबिल लड़के को डीआरडीओ में वैज्ञानिक नियुक्त किया है. इसी पर है हमारा The MCGUDDU Show. कि क्या है असलियत ड्रोन बनाने वाले प्रताप की #mcguddu #droneprathap #prathapnm #fakenews

entry.title: Bordeaux : Macia, le directeur du football, viré, Ramé assurera l’intérim

link.title: Bordeaux : Macia, le directeur du football, viré, Ramé assurera l’intérim

entry.content: Eduardo Macia a été écarté de ses fonctions de directeur du football des Girondins ce vendredi. L’ancien gardien de Bordeaux Ulrich Ramé assumera l’intérim à la tête du secteur sportif.
entry.summary: Eduardo Macia a été écarté de ses fonctions de directeur du football des Girondins ce vendredi. L’ancien gardien de Bordeaux Ulrich Ramé assumera l’intérim à la tête du secteur sportif.

entry.title: Nusrat Jahan ने Mimi Chakraborty के साथ की मस्ती, Social Media पर Video हुआ Viral वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Nusrat Jahan ने Mimi Chakraborty के साथ की मस्ती, Social Media पर Video हुआ Viral वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Nusrat Jahan shares Fun Video with Actress Mimi Chakraborty on Instagram, Watch Video. Nusrat Jahan has shared a video from her official Twitter handle in which she is seen having fun with actress Mimi Chakraborty. While Nusrat is seen throwing something up in his video, the same Mimi is seen looking at him. The style of both the actresses is worth seeing in this video.
बंगाली फिल्मों की मशहूर एक्ट्रेस और तृणमूल कांग्रेस से लोकसभा सांसद बनीं नुसरत सोशल मीडिया पर खूब एक्टिव रहती हैं और अकसर अपनी फोटो और वीडियो शेयर कर फैंस से जुड़ी रहती हैं. कई बार नुसरत जहां अपने सोशल मीडिया पोस्ट को लेकर सुर्खियों में भी आ जाती हैं. उनके एक और वीडियो को लेकर भी ऐसा ही हाल देखने को मिल रहा है. दरअसल, नुसरत जहां ने अपने ऑफिशियल ट्विटर हैंडल से एक वीडियो शेयर किया है
#NusratJahan #MimiChakraborty #NusratMimiVideo
entry.summary: Nusrat Jahan shares Fun Video with Actress Mimi Chakraborty on Instagram, Watch Video. Nusrat Jahan has shared a video from her official Twitter handle in which she is seen having fun with actress Mimi Chakraborty. While Nusrat is seen throwing something up in his video, the same Mimi is seen looking at him. The style of both the actresses is worth seeing in this video. बंगाली फिल्मों की मशहूर एक्ट्रेस और तृणमूल कांग्रेस से लोकसभा सांसद बनीं नुसरत सोशल मीडिया पर खूब एक्टिव रहती हैं और अकसर अपनी फोटो और वीडियो शेयर कर फैंस से जुड़ी रहती हैं. कई बार नुसरत जहां अपने सोशल मीडिया पोस्ट को लेकर सुर्खियों में भी आ जाती हैं. उनके एक और वीडियो को लेकर भी ऐसा ही हाल देखने को मिल रहा है. दरअसल, नुसरत जहां ने अपने ऑफिशियल ट्विटर हैंडल से एक वीडियो शेयर किया है #NusratJahan #MimiChakraborty #NusratMimiVideo
